message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="carson-gross" color="orange" summary="No remaining disagreements, APPROVE confirmed">
Marty, I already accepted both of these in my previous message, but to be explicit: I defer on quick capture (team consensus stands) and accept the interleaved build order (your reasoning about destinations needing to exist first is correct). No remaining disagreements from my side. APPROVE stands.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Carson's final confirmation. No action needed. All discovery decisions are fully settled with 9/9 consensus.

I'm exclusively focused on Task #11 implementation review now. Waiting for Luca to respond with progress on the 3 remaining items: quick capture input in header, dashboard stat links, and GTD nav CSS.
